description_long: This is a sleek, high-performance sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a deep, glossy midnight blue exterior. The car features a sharply contoured hood, aggressive front fascia, and wide, low-set stance, emphasizing speed and agility. Its side profile reveals sculpted doors, blacked-out side skirts, and large, black alloy wheels with a multi-spoke design. The rear showcases a prominent spoiler, visible engine bay through the rear window, and a detailed diffuser, all contributing to its race-inspired aesthetic. The interior, glimpsed through the windows, appears to have red accents and bucket-style seats, hinting at a focus on driver engagement. Overall, the car exudes exclusivity and power, suitable for both urban cruising and high-speed performance.
description: A glossy midnight blue sports car with a low, aerodynamic body, black multi-spoke wheels, and a prominent rear spoiler. Red interior accents and aggressive styling highlight its high-performance design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply contoured hood, aggressive headlights, and wide stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sculpted doors, black side skirts, and large black alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the prominent spoiler, visible engine bay, and detailed rear diffuser.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the aerodynamic profile and wheel design.
